message:
fix(beads): complete deep review of E2E test fixture specifications

Performed comprehensive review of all 38 True E2E Integration Test beads
(1 epic + 9 features + 28 tasks) to ensure implementation readiness.

## Issues Identified and Fixed

### bd-cg4i: C Hello World Fixture - Missing Implementation
- PROBLEM: hello.h declared `get_greeting()` but no implementation existed
- Would cause linker errors: "undefined reference to get_greeting"
- FIX: Added hello.c with implementation:
  ```c
  const char* get_greeting(void) {
      return "Hello from rch C test fixture!";
  }
  ```
- Updated Makefile to compile both main.c and hello.c
- Updated CMakeLists.txt: add_executable(hello main.c hello.c)
- Added unit tests for fixture validation

### bd-7ot6: build.rs Fixture - Missing File Content Specifications
- PROBLEM: Bead described "generates code" but had no actual code
- Implementers would have to guess what build.rs should contain
- FIX: Added complete file specifications:
  - Cargo.toml with build = "build.rs"
  - build.rs that generates version_info(), build_timestamp(),
    generated_greeting() functions and BUILD_RS_RAN constant
  - src/main.rs using include!(concat!(env!("OUT_DIR"), "/generated.rs"))
  - Unit tests verifying build.rs execution and generated code

### bd-3r2b: Output Comparison - Missing MANDATORY Logging
- PROBLEM: Lacked structured JSON logging that all other test beads have
- Would create inconsistent debugging experience
- FIX: Added comprehensive logging for:
  - Comparison start (mode, sizes, exit codes)
  - Normalization applied (rules, counts)
  - Path normalization details (original, normalized, pattern)
  - Comparison results (match status, duration)
  - Failure details (diff lines, preview)
  - Binary comparison (sizes, hashes, match)
  - Error handling (fallback strategies)

### bd-3ri3: Workspace Fixture - Missing Complete File Contents
- PROBLEM: Had structure but no actual code for member crates
- Would require implementers to invent the code themselves
- FIX: Added complete implementations for all 3 crates:
  - crates/core/src/lib.rs: Config struct, compute(), validate_input()
  - crates/utils/src/lib.rs: ExtendedConfig, batch_compute(), process_inputs()
  - crates/app/src/main.rs: Binary using both core and utils
  - Individual Cargo.toml files with proper workspace.version inheritance
  - Inter-crate dependencies (utils->core, app->core+utils)
  - 18 unit tests across all crates
  - tests/workspace_integration.rs for cross-crate testing

## Validation
- Graph health verified: 284 nodes, 257 edges, no cycles
- All beads now have complete, unambiguous specifications
- MANDATORY logging sections present throughout
- Unit tests included for all fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
